strategy: Do not blade. Blades trigger escalating punishments: a damage blade Tower Shields him, a second blade Plagues you, a third brings Legion Shield, a fourth brings Virulent Plague. Set up with traps and Feint instead.
Skip DoTs. Any DoT makes him cast Mass Triage and wipe it.
Hit with Life (+15% incoming); avoid Death (50% resist).
After you attack he shields the target in the school you used, so a repeat same-school hit is blunted. Hit once, hard, or poke with Balance which only earns him a Tower Shield.
Stack Feint and traps, then one big single hit to drop the 5,270 health.
cheatNotes: Join before the duel starts or he Mana Burns 3 pips off the latecomer.
Using a DoT makes him cast Mass Triage, wiping your damage-over-time. Hit direct instead.
A damage blade or damage global makes him Tower Shield himself. Lean on traps and Feint so he stays unshielded.
A second blade makes him Plague your team, cutting your damage.
A third blade brings a Legion Shield on his side.
A fourth blade brings Virulent Plague. The blade punishments escalate, so avoid stacking blades entirely.
The blade-count punishments reset after the fourth and repeat, so there is no safe blade later either.
After you attack, he shields the target in the school you used. A repeat same-school hit is weakened, so hit once, hard, or switch schools.
An AoE makes him cast that shield on each of his allies, three times, so his whole side gets shielded.
Hitting with Balance only earns him a Tower Shield rather than a school shield, a safe school to poke with.
Multi-hit spells make him shield for every hit, stacking shields fast. Avoid multi-hit attacks.
